content.text:
Build succeeded (only pre-existing warnings, no errors).

**Root cause:** Two leftover debug `eprintln!` statements in `crates/lua-vm/src/vm.rs` at line 1926 (`OP_MMBIN`) and line 1941 (`OP_MMBINI`). These were instrumentation from a prior debug session that never got cleaned up, polluting stderr output with `DBG MMBIN:` / `DBG MMBINI:` lines whenever a binary-op metamethod fired.

**Fix:** Removed both `eprintln!` lines. The actual VM logic was already correct — the test was computing `15` correctly; the diff failure was purely cosmetic stderr noise.

**New state:** Did not re-run per instructions. Build is green; the mega-loop will re-test. The expected output `15` should now appear without the `DBG MMBIN:` preamble. This also fixes the many other failing tests visible in `scan-1/`/`scan-2/` outputs (prog-29, 60, 61, 70, 74, bitwise, repro_math) that were tripping on the same stray prints.
